name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for deviation percentage and values.

name: Forecast Telemetry Key (DS[0])
helpText: Telemetry key for the P50 daily forecast value. Mapped to datasource key [0].

name: Actual Telemetry Key (DS[1])
helpText: Telemetry key for actual daily energy. Mapped to datasource key [1].

name: P50 Annual Energy Attribute
helpText: Server attribute key for annual P50 energy (kWh). Used for derived mode fallback.

name: Warning Threshold (%)
helpText: Deviation at or above this is MINOR DEVIATION (amber). Default: -5%.

name: Critical Threshold (%)
helpText: Deviation below this is CRITICAL DEVIATION (red). Default: -10%.

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Enable Manual Simulation?
helpText: When enabled, uses the manual deviation value below instead of live data.

name: Simulated Deviation %
helpText: Fixed deviation percentage used in manual simulation mode.

name: Invert Colors?
helpText: Enable if positive deviation is bad (flips green/red logic).

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic tooltip. Leave empty for auto-generated context.
